item.title: Sensex Edges Higher Amid Mixed Sectoral Trends; Realty Drags Market
item.description: The Indian equity market closed marginally higher on 16 Mar 2026, with the Sensex gaining 41.63 points or 0.06% to settle at 74,605.55. Despite a volatile session that saw the index open sharply lower, a recovery driven by select large caps and sectoral rotation helped the benchmark end in positive territory. However, broader market indices and mid- and small-cap segments faced selling pressure, reflecting a cautious investor sentiment amid mixed global cues and sectoral performances. Time: 39 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Downward Pressure Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, has experienced a notable decline, falling 1.13% today and registering a sharper 5.04% drop over the past five trading sessions. This downturn reflects a broad-based weakness across the segment, with only a handful of stocks managing to buck the trend amid challenging market conditions. Time: 39 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Downward Pressure Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has experienced a notable decline in recent sessions, reflecting a broader market correction and sector-specific challenges. Over the past five days, the index has fallen by 4.54%, signalling increased volatility and investor caution in this high-growth but risk-prone segment. Time: 39 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Sees Mild Decline Amid Mixed Stock Performance
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, experienced a marginal decline of 0.11% today, extending a recent downtrend that has seen the index fall by 4.64% over the past five trading sessions. While some heavyweight stocks delivered modest gains, the broader large-cap universe displayed a cautious tone with a notable tilt towards defensive sectors amid ongoing market uncertainties. Time: 39 minutes ago

item.title: Rossari Biotech Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.434.35 Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Rossari Biotech Ltd, a player in the Specialty Chemicals sector, has reached a new 52-week low of Rs.434.35, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid ongoing market pressures and company-specific performance factors. Time: 53 minutes ago

item.title: Sterling & Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd Hits 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Sterling & Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd has reached a new 52-week low of Rs.165.4, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid broader market fluctuations and company-specific performance factors. Time: 53 minutes ago

item.title: Vikas Lifecare Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.1.24
item.description: Vikas Lifecare Ltd has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.1.24 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid a sustained downward trend. The stock has underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting ongoing pressures on the company’s financial and market performance. Time: 54 minutes ago

item.title: MSTC Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.395 Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Shares of MSTC Ltd, a company operating in the Trading & Distributors sector, declined sharply to hit a fresh 52-week low of Rs.395 on 16 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s ongoing downward trajectory. This new low reflects a continuation of recent losses and highlights the challenges the stock has faced over the past year. Time: 54 minutes ago

item.title: Indian Railway Catering & Tourism Corporation Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.518.35
item.description: Indian Railway Catering & Tourism Corporation Ltd (IRCTC) has reached a new 52-week low of Rs.518.35 today, marking a significant decline in its share price amid broader sector and market pressures. The stock has been on a downward trajectory for the past two days, registering a cumulative loss of 1.99% during this period. Time: 54 minutes ago

item.title: Anand Rayons Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Anand Rayons Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Garments & Apparels sector, touched a new 52-week low of Rs.67.7 today, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing decline. The stock has been under pressure for the past 21 consecutive trading sessions, culminating in a cumulative loss of 65.78% over this period. Time: 55 minutes ago

item.title: Rites Ltd. Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.188.3 Amid Sector Weakness
item.description: Rites Ltd., a prominent player in the construction sector, witnessed its stock price decline to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.188.3 today, marking a significant milestone in its recent trading performance. The stock has underperformed both its sector and broader market indices, reflecting a combination of subdued financial metrics and challenging market conditions. Time: 55 minutes ago

item.title: Goyal Aluminiums Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Goyal Aluminiums Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Trading & Distributors sector, has touched a new 52-week and all-time low of Rs.5.9 today, marking a significant decline amid persistent downward momentum. The stock has underperformed its sector and benchmark indices, reflecting ongoing pressures on its financial performance and valuation metrics. Time: 55 minutes ago

item.title: Radhika Jeweltech Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 55.51
item.description: Radhika Jeweltech Ltd’s stock declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.55.51 today, marking a significant downturn amid broader market fluctuations and sectoral underperformance. The stock has now recorded a four-day consecutive fall, accumulating a loss of 9.65% over this period, reflecting persistent selling pressure. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: HPL Electric & Power Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.275.2
item.description: HPL Electric & Power Ltd has declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.275.2 on 16 Mar 2026, marking a significant downturn for the stock within the Other Electrical Equipment sector. The stock’s recent performance reflects a series of declines amid broader market volatility and sectoral underperformance. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: AMS Polymers Ltd Hits New 52-Week High at Rs.41.93
item.description: AMS Polymers Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Specialty Chemicals sector, reached a significant milestone on 16 Mar 2026 by hitting a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs.41.93. This marks a continuation of the stock’s strong upward momentum, reflecting a remarkable 62.71% gain over the past ten trading sessions. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Lloyds Engineering Works Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.40.41
item.description: Lloyds Engineering Works Ltd, a player in the Industrial Manufacturing sector, has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.40.41 today, marking a significant decline amid a broader market environment that remains cautious. The stock has underperformed its sector and the broader market over the past year, reflecting a combination of valuation concerns and subdued profit trends. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Matrimony.com Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.363.3
item.description: Matrimony.com Ltd, a player in the E-Retail and E-Commerce sector, has reached a new 52-week low of Rs.363.3, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid ongoing downward momentum. The stock has underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting persistent challenges in its financial performance and market positioning. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Gautam Gems Ltd Stock Hits 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Underperformance
item.description: Gautam Gems Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Gems, Jewellery and Watches sector, has touched a new 52-week and all-time low of Rs.2.77 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid ongoing challenges reflected in its financial and market performance. Time: 57 minutes ago

item.title: Praxis Home Retail Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.6.28 Amid Continued Decline
item.description: Praxis Home Retail Ltd has touched a new 52-week and all-time low of Rs.6.28 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid sustained negative performance and weakening fundamentals within the Garments & Apparels sector. Time: 57 minutes ago

item.title: Sharika Enterprises Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.10.16
item.description: Sharika Enterprises Ltd has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.10.16 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid a challenging year for the company. This fresh low comes after a sustained period of underperformance relative to the broader market and sector peers. Time: 57 minutes ago
